windows.embed_text_v2: Melts pale yellow solid wax block in stainless steel pot/double boiler, slab gradually liquefies into clear golden molten wax pool, wooden stirring stick begins pushing block into the melt.
windows.summary_v2: Melts a chunky pale-yellow solid wax block in a stainless steel pot/double boiler, gradually producing a pool of clear golden molten wax stirred with a wooden stick.

seconds_v2.desc: Close-up of a chunky pale-yellow solid wax block sitting inside a stainless steel pot/double boiler, beginning to soften at the edges.
Same close-up, the wax slab leaning against the pot wall, surface starting to glisten as it warms.
Continued melt, a small pool of clear golden molten wax visible at the bottom edge of the steel pot.
Same shot, the solid wax block tilts slightly as the base liquifies and pools beneath it.
Side view of the wax block partly submerged in a pool of clear golden melted wax in the stainless steel pot.
Continued melting, the solid block growing smaller as more golden liquid wax accumulates in the pot.
Close-up of the softening wax slab with a thicker pool of golden molten wax visible around it.
Same shot, the wax block leaning further as melting progresses, more liquid wax revealed.
A wooden stirring stick/spoon enters from the top, beginning to push the remaining solid wax into the molten pool to speed melting.

windows.embed_text_v2: Continues melting pale yellow solid wax block in stainless steel pot/double boiler, slab slumps into growing pool of clear golden molten wax, wooden stick presses block down to accelerate melt.
windows.summary_v2: Continues melting a pale-yellow solid wax block in a stainless steel pot, the slab progressively slumping into a growing pool of clear golden molten wax.

seconds_v2.desc: Close-up of the pale-yellow solid wax block in the stainless steel pot, a wooden stirring stick poking into its top to press it down into the melt.
Wooden stir stick out of frame, wax block has softened and slumped, glistening surface from partial melt.
Side angle: a slab of solid wax leans against the pot wall as clear golden melted wax pools beneath it.
Same side view, the slab continuing to melt down into the golden liquid pool.
Close-up of the slab edge softening, crystalline grainy surface texture as it transitions to liquid.
Continued melt with the solid wax block now mostly leaning into the pool of molten wax.
Side view, a larger pool of golden molten wax fills the bottom of the steel pot beside the shrinking solid block.
Same shot, the wax block becomes smaller as more clear golden melted wax accumulates.
Continued melting close-up, golden molten wax visible at right and base, solid wax slab nearly half melted.

windows.embed_text_v2: melting a solid slab of pale wax inside a stainless steel pot, wax block slumping into pool of molten amber wax, steam rising, melting stage candle making close-up
windows.summary_v2: A close-up of a solid pale wax slab melting down inside a stainless steel pot, slumping into a growing pool of molten amber wax with steam rising as melting progresses.

seconds_v2.desc: Close-up inside a stainless steel pot: a large pale wax slab tilted at an angle, partially submerged in shallow melted amber wax at the bottom of the pot.
Same close-up of the wax slab leaning in the steel pot, with the lower edges sitting in melted amber wax pooling around it.
Wax slab continues to soften slightly at its lower edges, still propped against the inside wall of the stainless pot above the melted wax.
Slab leans further into the pot, partially submerging into the molten wax pool which has grown a touch larger.
Solid block of wax tipping forward, more of its surface coated in liquid wax, melted pool deepening.
Wax slab tilts further down as it melts from below, surface glossy with melted wax running down it.
Slab now leaning lower in the pot, faint steam visible above the rim, melted amber wax filling more of the base.
Wax block continues to slump as it melts, glossy fluid wax covering most of its lower half.
Block is noticeably smaller and more submerged in the wider pool of melted wax, steam wisps rise above the pot rim.

windows.embed_text_v2: melting wax slab down in stainless steel pot, solid wax block shrinks into thin floating shard, pot fills with molten amber wax, melting stage candle making
windows.summary_v2: Close-up continues as the wax slab fully melts down to a thin floating shard in a pot full of molten amber wax.

seconds_v2.desc: Continued close-up of the wax slab in the stainless pot; block has shrunk noticeably, sitting in a wider pool of melted amber wax with light steam above.
Wax slab leaning further into the molten pool, surface glistening with melted wax running down the sides.
Slab continues to slump as it melts, top corner thinning, melted wax pool deepening in the steel pot.
Block has reduced in size, now lying half-submerged in the amber melted wax inside the pot.
Wax slab is much thinner, mostly floating on the surface of the molten wax pool.
Slab is now a small piece floating in the deepening pool of melted wax.
Only a thin wedge of solid wax remains floating, the pot mostly filled with liquid amber wax.
Thin strip of solid wax floats on the surface of the molten pool, melting nearly complete.
A small slender shard of unmelted wax floats on the wide pool of liquid amber wax filling the steel pot.
